Race Ride Fire

Introduction

Born out of a passion for the sport, and backed by various partners, Race Ride Fire will debut in 2024 headed by an experienced operations team both on and off the bike.

Find out more 
Our Partners
The Team

BACKED BY A COLLECTIVE OF EXPERTISE

Race Ride Fire is powered by a collective of expertise both on and off the bike, steering the team’s inception and continual growth. Together, we boast a wealth of cycling experience spanning all levels, from recreational enthusiasts to seasoned professionals.

Find out more 
Latest News
16 Jul 24
Sponsorship

Sponsor Race Ride Fire
Are you ready to elevate your brand and make a meaningful impact in the world of cycling and further afield? At Race Ride Fire, we offer a unique opportunity to maximise your return on investment by strategically representing your company and brand across a variety of channels. From corporate and sporting events to online and social media, our sponsorship packages are designed to provide extensive exposure and engagement.

Equipment

Ride Fire – for increased rider experience

Explore the Ignite, Ride Fire’s top-tier performance bike designed to elevate your riding experience. Engineered for speed and agility, its aerodynamic design and precision components guarantee unrivalled performance on every journey. Equipped with a Shimano Dura Ace Di2 group set and Hunt 48 Limitless UD Carbon Spoke Disc Wheelset, the Ignite is crafted to dominate any terrain with confidence and finesse. Shop now and conquer the road with the ultimate in cycling excellence.

Go to shop

Hunt Wheels – a British brand competing on a global scale

Experience unparalleled speed and performance with Hunt wheels, backed by innovation to redefine cycling standards. Designed with aerodynamics and compatibility with modern width road tires in mind, these wheels ensure unmatched agility and efficiency on every journey. With a feather-light weight of just 1380g and engineered for maximum speed, they represent the pinnacle of uncompromising performance. hop now and elevate your ride to new heights.

Go to shop

CCN – competition proven across numerous international tours

Step into superior comfort and style with CCN kit, crafted with over 15 years of expertise in product development. With a focus on feedback from cyclists worldwide, CCN deliver top-quality cycling garments that ensure our team rides with confidence and flair. From technical precision to unmatched comfort, the kit is designed to elevate performance and help riders excel on every journey. Explore the collection now and gear up for your next ride in style.

Go to shop

Nimbl ‘Ultimate’ White Silver

The ULTIMATE by Nimbl isn’t just any shoe – it’s the same one that propelled Team Jumbo-Visma to victory in all three Grand Tours of 2023! Ridden by cycling legends like Primoz Roglic, Jonas Vingegaard, and Sepp Kuss, these shoes have already made history at the toughest races in the world. Ready to step up your game and follow in their winning tracks? Browse Nimbls range today.

Go to shop

Giro – for the best fit, finish and comfort

Experience unmatched performance on the road with Giro helmets – lighter, cooler, and sleeker than ever before. Engineered with the latest Spherical Technology powered by MIPS® and featuring the innovative DryCore™ Sweat Management System, the Helios Spherical helmet sets a new standard in cycling safety and comfort. Get ready to ride with confidence knowing you’re protected by the best. Shop now and discover the next level of cycling helmet technology.

Go to shop
